name: @inversealtruism/csd-indexwire
description: The csd-indexer REST wire contract: TypeScript types for every served row shape (proposals, attestations, txs/outputs, health, analytics) + runtime guards that mirror the production consumer postures (fail-loud on structure, conservative on values). One source of truth for a contract that was previously hand-maintained in the indexer serializer, the cairnx scanner, cairn, cairn-sdk, and four test suites.
